chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, AT KARACHI C. P. No. D-2788 of 2025 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Date: order with signature(s) of Judge(s) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on CMA No.12601/2025. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 5. 3. For orders on CMA No.12602/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 03.07.2025. Mr. G. M. Korai, Advocate for the Petitioner. --------- 1. Granted. 2-4. When confronted about the FIRs being registered in the year 2024, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that those have been challaned. However, the Petitioner has the grievance against the fresh FIRs. Learned counsel for the Petitioner under the instructions does not press the instant Petition and on the ground that he will file a fresh one. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
